title: Ratchet Workflow Configuration
description: Ratchet workflow configuration — components, phases, guards, and progress tracking

version.description: Schema version — must be 2 for workflow.yaml

escalation.description: Escalation policy when max_rounds reached without consensus

adapter.description: Work tracking adapter — failures never block debates

options.description: Adapter-specific configuration options (e.g., repo owner, project ID)

pr_scope.description: Granularity of pull requests — issue (one PR per issue, default — natural unit for parallel execution), debate (one PR per pair consensus), phase (one PR per completed phase), or milestone (one PR per completed milestone)

max_regressions.description: Maximum phase regressions per milestone. Integer applies to all phases (e.g., 2). Object sets per-phase limits with fallback to 2 for unspecified phases (e.g., {"build": 3, "review": 1}).

workspaces.description: Workspace definitions. When present, this is a root coordinator config — pairs, components, and guards live in each workspace's own .ratchet/ directory.

models.description: Model assignments for each agent role. Per-pair overrides can narrow generative/adversarial models. In root config, these are inherited by all workspaces.

components.description: Logical groupings of files with per-component workflow policies

pairs.description: Agent pairs — generative + adversarial debate partners

resources.description: Shared resources that guards may need exclusive access to (databases, test servers, etc.)

model_id.description: Claude model tier — opus (most capable), sonnet (balanced), haiku (fastest)

debate_runner.description: Protocol orchestration — no reasoning needed, sonnet is sufficient

generative.description: Writes code and makes design decisions — needs full capability

adversarial.description: Reviews code and runs validation — structured critique

tiebreaker.description: Reads transcripts and renders judgment on escalated debates

analyst.description: Deep analysis, pattern recognition, pair generation

models.description: Global model assignments for each agent role

path.description: Relative path from repo root to the workspace directory (must contain its own .ratchet/)

phase.description: Ordered development phase — plan → test → build → review → harden

workflow_preset.description: Workflow preset selecting phase subsets. tdd: plan→test→build→review→harden. traditional: plan→build→review→harden. review-only: review only.

scope.description: Comma-separated file glob patterns for this component

workflow.description: Which phases apply to this component

component.description: Component this pair belongs to (must match a component name)

phase.description: Phase this pair runs in — defaults to 'review'

scope.description: Comma-separated file glob patterns this pair reviews. Use "auto" to inherit scope from the parent component.

max_rounds.description: Per-pair max rounds override — omit to use global max_rounds

models.description: Per-pair model overrides for generative/adversarial agents — omit to use global models

command.description: Shell command to execute — exit 0 = pass, non-zero = fail

phase.description: Phase boundary where this guard runs (after phase completes)

blocking.description: If true, failure blocks advancement to next phase. If false, advisory only.

timing.description: When this guard runs — pre-debate (before debates start) or post-debate (after debates complete, default)

components.description: Components this guard applies to (empty = all components)

requires.description: Resources this guard needs (must match resource names). Singleton resources are locked before running and released after.

start.description: Shell command to start/provision this resource (must be idempotent)

stop.description: Shell command to stop/teardown this resource (optional — runs when all pipelines complete)

singleton.description: If true, only one pipeline at a time may use this resource. A file lock serializes access.
